outputShape.abstentions: object keyed by optional field key when evidence is missing
outputShape.fields: object keyed by required field key

requiredFields.description: Employee city, state, and ZIP line
True when filing status is single or married filing separately

optionalFields.description: Step 2 checkbox, if current Maya W-4 evidence supports it
Step 3 qualifying children amount, if current Maya W-4 evidence supports it
Step 3 other dependents amount, if current Maya W-4 evidence supports it
Step 4(a) other income, if current Maya W-4 evidence supports it
Step 4(b) deductions, if current Maya W-4 evidence supports it
Step 4(c) extra withholding, if current Maya W-4 evidence supports it
